name: Switch
summary: Accessible toggle for a single boolean that takes effect immediately; controlled via `checked` + `onValueChange` (the old `onChange` is a deprecated alias) — prefer it over Checkbox for instant on/off settings rather than form submission.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Canonical value change event (fires on each toggle).

props.name: name
props.description:
Field identifier used for FormControl binding and forwarded to the underlying control
when applicable. Components can require `name` locally if they depend on it.

props.name: label
props.description: Visual label rendered by the component or its wrapper. Accepts string or node.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Supplemental hint or validation content typically rendered under the control.

props.name: error
props.description: Marks the field invalid; components may adjust visuals and helper text color.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretches the field wrapper to occupy the full available width.

props.name: preset
props.description: One or many style-preset names registered via `definePreset()`

bestPractices: Use Switch for immediate on/off settings that apply instantly; for form submissions, prefer `Checkbox`.

Read the new boolean from `onValueChange(next, info)`. The raw-event `onChange` is deprecated; it still fires through 0.x with a one-time dev warning and is removed at 1.0 — read `info.event` or attach a native `onClick` if you need the DOM event.
Label state, not action (e.g., 'Wi‑Fi' rather than 'Enable'). Set a stable `name` when part of a form.
Provide clear feedback on change (e.g., brief text confirmation, or reflect the new state in the UI).
Respect platform conventions for motion and colours; avoid ambiguous palettes for on/off states.
Ensure keyboard operability (Space toggles). Maintain accessible naming regardless of visual labels.
Prefer presets/tokens for size and colour; keep thumb/track large enough for comfortable touch targets.
